data.current_description: Send a web push notification to subscribers. The notification includes a title, message, landing URL, and optional icon.
data.description_suggestion: Send a web push notification to website subscribers with customizable content. The notification request must include a title, message, and landing URL, with optional icon. Returns a notification response containing the notification ID, status, and delivery confirmation. This operation triggers immediate delivery to all targeted subscribers and creates a notification record in the system.

message: Operation 'listSubscribers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The current summary is too generic (vague_summary). The description lacks information about available parameters like pagination and filtering (missing_input_details) and doesn't explain what subscriber data is returned (missing_output_details). AI agents need to understand how to use pagination, what parameters are available, and what subscriber information will be included in the response to properly construct requests and handle results.

data.current_description: Get a list of all subscribers for your website.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all website subscribers with pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a paginated list of all website subscribers. Supports filtering and pagination parameters to control result set size and offset. Returns an array of subscriber objects containing subscriber details such as ID, subscription status, and subscription date. Use pagination parameters to handle large subscriber lists efficiently.
